title: dubautia × ternifolia
intro: Dubautia × ternifolia, also known as the Ma'o hau hele or yellow hibiscus, is a rare and endangered hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the mā'o hau hele genus. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Dubautia × ternifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a valuable resource for traditional Hawaiian healers and modern herbalists.
